title: O Hear My Urgent Cry

verses.text: Now lead me to the rock, O God, that’s higher far than I. For you’re my refuge from the foe, my tow’r of strength on high.
O let me dwell within your tent, forever there to live. And let me shelter ‘neath your wings; sure refuge they will give.
So I will ever bless your name with songs of joy and praise, as I perform my holy vows with gladness all my days.
